alkylation reagent: alkylated by 2% SDS, 110 mM TCEP and 84 mM iodoacetamide respectively.
alkylation concentration: alkylated by 2% SDS, 110 mM TCEP and 84 mM iodoacetamide respectively.
cleavage agent: after performing an overnight trypsin digestion.
collision energy: the instrument was set to Top 10, isolation window 1.2 m/z and the NCE to 32.
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (LC-MS/MS).
labeling: Samples were labeled for quantification using a modified TMTpro™ 16plex Label Reagent Set (Thermo Scientific™) after performing an overnight trypsin digestion.
reduction reagent: by 2% SDS, 110 mM TCEP and 84 mM iodoacetamide respectively.
reduction concentration: by 2% SDS, 110 mM TCEP and 84 mM iodoacetamide respectively.
